bug.description: CRC computation or checking error causing false positive or missed error detection

prompt:
There is a CRC computation or checking error causing false positive or missed error detection downstream of function oai_nfapi_harq_indication in the nfapi/oai_integration subsystem.
The function is located at nfapi/oai_integration/nfapi_pnf.c:2349.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
